info_vivienda: Tell us about your home and family situation
importante_compromisos: It's important that you are aware of the commitments you make when adopting
verifica_informacion: Verify that all information is correct before submitting
cuéntanos_experiencia: Tell us about your experience with pets
por_qué_adoptar: Why do you want to adopt?
compromiso1: Provide adequate care, nutritious food and clean water
compromiso2: Take the pet to the vet regularly for vaccines and checkups
compromiso3: Never abandon the pet and seek help in case of difficulties
compromiso4: Allow foundation follow-up to verify the pet's well-being
aviso_revision: This information will be reviewed by our team. We will contact you if we need clarification.
solicitud_en_revision: Your request is being reviewed by our team. We will contact you soon.
espera_contacto: Wait for us to contact you
entrevista: We will conduct an interview to get to know you better
visita_hogar: We will visit your home to make sure it is suitable
firma_contrato: The adoption contract will be signed
debes_iniciar_sesion: You must log in to request an adoption
mascota_no_disponible: This pet is no longer available for adoption
experiencia_minimo: Tell us about your experience with pets (minimum 10 characters)
motivo_minimo: Tell us why you want to adopt (minimum 10 characters)
compromiso_cuidado_requerido: You must accept the responsible care commitment
compromiso_esterilizacion_requerido: You must accept the sterilization commitment
compromiso_seguimiento_requerido: You must accept the follow-up commitment
sin_fundacion_desc: This pet is not associated with any foundation
